---
name: Suggest an edit or improvement
about: 对 USTC Mirrors 帮助文档提出修订或改进建议 (Suggest an edit or improvement for USTC Mirrors documentation)
---

<!-- 
本仓库只接受科大镜像站**帮助文档**直接相关的 issues。反馈故障/问题请至 <https://github.com/ustclug/discussions/issues>。申请添加新镜像请至 <https://github.com/ustclug/mirrorrequest/issues>。

**在此仓库错误提交故障反馈或镜像请求（与帮助文档不直接相关的 issue）会导致你的账号被我们临时封禁**。以下是一些**不应该**在这里提交的 issue 的例子：

- [UV_DOWNLOAD_URL变量无法下载](https://github.com/ustclug/discussions/issues/522)
- [curl 下载CPAN 失败](https://github.com/ustclug/discussions/issues/520)
- [docker ce的fedora43，为什么没有自动同步？](https://github.com/ustclug/discussions/issues/512)

This repo only accepts issues about the **help documentation** of USTC Mirrors. Please report bugs about mirrors to <https://github.com/ustclug/discussions/issues>. If you want us add a new mirror, please go to <https://github.com/ustclug/mirrorrequest/issues> to submit your request.

**Your GitHub account would be banned by us temporarily here if your issue is not directly about help documentation**.
-->

如果你的 issue 与帮助文档直接相关，可以删除本段话：**我已经阅读上述注释，了解在此仓库错误提交故障反馈或镜像请求（与帮助文档不直接相关的 issue）会导致我的账号被临时封禁**。
